posts.author: l27 (John Long)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
I have changed a board to shareable. This had the negative consequence of basically removing everyone’s access internally. I want anyone internally to still have access without having to invite them. Is this possible? I can invite everyone, but I don’t want to trigger an email to everyone!

Thanks,
-Monday Noob

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
see https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/115005311105-The-difference-between-board-types

For shareable board you need to invite all board members (team members AND guests)
